generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution encoder mounted directly on the motor providing angular position data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot. Part of dual encoder configuration for precise motion control."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution encoder positioned behind the gearbox providing secondary angular position data for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot. Complements motor encoder for enhanced motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis. Provides real-time electrical load data for the Digital Shadow."
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring output angle from the gear transmission system, providing mechanical position feedback for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Implied sensor providing torque measurement data for the first axis, enabling calculation of mechanical load and friction characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance AngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor providing angular velocity data derived from position encoders, enabling dynamic behavior analysis of the robot's first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
    base:desc "Time-series angular position data from motor encoder transmitted via MQTT protocol with event-triggered, low-latency publish-subscribe communication."
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
    base:desc "Time-series angular position data from secondary encoder transmitted via MQTT protocol with event-triggered, low-latency publish-subscribe communication."
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Time-series electrical current data transmitted via MQTT protocol with event-triggered, low-latency publish-subscribe communication."
]

instance OutputAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OutputAngleSensor
    base:desc "Time-series mechanical angle data transmitted via MQTT protocol with event-triggered, low-latency publish-subscribe communication."
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
    base:desc "Time-series torque measurement data transmitted via MQTT protocol with event-triggered, low-latency publish-subscribe communication."
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocitySensor
    base:desc "Time-series angular velocity data derived from position encoders and transmitted via MQTT protocol with event-triggered, low-latency publish-subscribe communication."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural representation of MABI MAX 100 robot's mechanical components including axes, gear transmissions, and motor mounts. Defined using SysML or ADLs for architectural representation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic behavior model of the robot's first axis including state machines for operational modes and simulation models for actuator dynamics. Implemented using MontiArc Automaton or SysML state machines."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomatonEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model describing the robot's forward and inverse kinematics for the first axis, including gear ratio calculations and joint coordinate transformations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, CppImplementationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based model capturing friction characteristics in the gear transmission system, enabling accurate simulation of mechanical losses."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, JavaImplementationEnabler
]

instance SensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated time-series data from all physical sensors including position, current, torque, and velocity measurements. Processed for visualization and simulation support."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted, InputCurrentDataTransmitted, OutputAngleDataTransmitted, TorqueDataTransmitted, AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocolEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance ContextualDataTraces : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed sensor data traces with contextual metadata enabling stakeholder-specific abstractions for manufacturing applications."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message Queuing Telemetry Transport protocol implementation enabling low-latency, event-triggered data transmission from physical sensors to Digital Shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, SimulationSupportService
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Systems Modeling Language implementation supporting multi-layered system engineering across requirements, functional, logical, and product layers."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, ModelIntegrationService
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton framework for behavioral modeling and state machine implementation in the Digital Shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables BehavioralAnalysisService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink environment for detailed dynamic simulation and behavioral analysis of the robot's first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationSupportService, FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell implementation providing semantic interoperability and contextual data aggregation for manufacturing applications."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService, StakeholderAccessService
]

instance CppImplementationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ implementation environment for low-level code generation and integration with simulation tools."
    DTDFVocab:enables KinematicAnalysisService
]

instance JavaImplementationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Java implementation environment for high-level system integration and service provision."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionAnalysisService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization framework enabling presentation of aggregated sensor data for heterogeneous stakeholders."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated aggregation of time-series sensor data from MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis via MQTT protocol for Digital Shadow."
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Presentation of processed sensor data in dashboards for engineers and operators to monitor robot performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides RobotPerformanceInsight
]

instance SimulationSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compatibility with modeling tools for behavioral analysis including friction modeling and kinematic validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides KinematicValidationInsight, FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance BehavioralAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of robot's dynamic behavior using state machines and simulation models to validate operational modes."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalModeInsight
]

instance KinematicAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calculation and validation of forward and inverse kinematics for the robot's first axis using mathematical models."
    DTDFVocab:provides KinematicAccuracyInsight
]

instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Analysis of mechanical losses in the gear transmission system using physics-based friction models."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossInsight
]

instance DataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of heterogeneous data sources through Asset Administration Shell for contextual aggregation."
    DTDFVocab:provides IntegratedDataInsight
]

instance StakeholderAccessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides tailored data abstractions for different stakeholder groups (engineers, operators) based on their specific needs."
    DTDFVocab:provides StakeholderSpecificInsight
]

instance ModelIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of geometric, behavioral, and analytical models across different abstraction layers using SysML and ADLs."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelConsistencyInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance SensorDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of raw and processed sensor data from MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis for immediate operational awareness."
]

instance RobotPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized performance metrics including position accuracy, speed, and electrical load for operational assessment."
]

instance KinematicValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of calculated kinematic trajectories against actual robot movements to ensure motion control accuracy."
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Characterization of friction losses in the gear transmission system to optimize energy efficiency and reduce wear."
]

instance OperationalModeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of robot's operational states and transitions to ensure proper functioning across different manufacturing tasks."
]

instance KinematicAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative assessment of the robot's positioning accuracy based on kinematic model validation."
]

instance FrictionLossInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative measurement of mechanical energy losses due to friction in the transmission system."
]

instance IntegratedDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Contextually aggregated data combining sensor measurements with environmental and operational parameters."
]

instance StakeholderSpecificInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tailored data presentations and abstractions for different stakeholder groups based on their specific roles and requirements."
]

instance ModelConsistencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of consistency between geometric, behavioral, and analytical models across different abstraction layers."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot with maximum speed of 75°/s and operational range [-90°, 90°]."
]

instance GearTransmissionSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gear transmission system connecting the motor to the robot's first axis, providing torque amplification and motion control."
]

instance SINUMERIK840DslCNC : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC system providing remote control capabilities for the robot's actuators with hardware/software safety limits."
]

// C1: Environment
instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Industrial automation environment where MABI MAX 100 robot operates with precise motion control requirements."
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, GearTransmissionSystem, SINUMERIK840DslCNC,
            MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, InputCurrentSensor, OutputAngleSensor,
            TorqueSensor, AngularVelocitySensor
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin (DT) constellation** in this context is implicitly defined through **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** and **architecture description languages (ADLs)**. The system employs **component & connector-based architectures** (e.g., ACME, AADL, MontiArc, SysML IBDs) to orchestrate interactions between **physical and digital components**, enabling **modular integration** of heterogeneous tools (e.g., Simulink, C++, Java). **Coordination mechanisms** are supported via **behavioral modeling** (e.g., state machines in SysML v1.7, MontiArc Automaton) and **simulation tools**, ensuring **real-time or near-real-time synchronization** of system states. The document does not specify explicit **orchestration patterns** (e.g., microservices, event-driven) but implies **resource management** through **multi-level abstraction** (requirements to product layers) and **stakeholder integration** via MBSE methodologies. No explicit mention of **resource allocation** or **system-wide coordination protocols** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) is provided."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system’s fidelity is implicitly tied to the **comparison of simulated data (from MBSE models) with measured data (from physical sensors)** to validate model accuracy. However, the document does not specify **quantitative fidelity requirements**, **uncertainty sources**, or **error detection/correction mechanisms**. Validation and verification methods are not explicitly detailed beyond the **passive aggregation** of sensor data in the Digital Shadow and the **active processing** role of the Digital Twin. No **quality assurance processes** (e.g., cross-validation between simulation tools or formal verification) are mentioned for the system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **technical network infrastructure** for the Digital Shadow system includes the use of the **MQTT protocol** for streaming sensor data from physical objects to their digital counterparts. No further details are provided regarding **network topology/architecture**, **bandwidth/latency requirements**, **reliability/redundancy mechanisms**, or **security protocols**. The system’s reliance on MQTT suggests a lightweight, event-driven communication model, but no explicit specifications for network segmentation, failover mechanisms, or encryption methods (e.g., TLS) are mentioned."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The document highlights **horizontal integration** through **interoperability standards** and **data exchange protocols** implicit in **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** and **architecture description languages (ADLs)**. Key technologies include:
  - **SysML (Systems Modeling Language)** for **cross-domain integration** (e.g., requirements, functional, logical, and physical layers).
  - **ADLs (e.g., ACME, AADL, MontiArc)** for **component-based interoperability**, enabling **interface standardization** and **connector-based communication**.
  - **Simulation tools (e.g., MathWorks Simulink, state machines in SysML v1.7)** for **behavioral synchronization** with external systems.
  - **General-purpose languages (C++, Java)** for **code-level integration** with enterprise or third-party systems.
  The document does not specify **exact protocols** (e.g., OPC UA, REST, MQTT) or **dependencies on external systems**, but the use of **heterogeneous tools** suggests **adapter-based integration patterns**. No mention of **Digital Twin-to-Digital Twin (DT-to-DT) integration** or **enterprise system interoperability frameworks** (e.g., Industry 4.0 standards) is provided."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system in Document [42] employs a **Digital Shadow** architecture integrated across multiple levels of the **Automation Pyramid**, where safety constraints are implicitly enforced through **formal model-driven engineering** (as described in Document [43]). The system leverages **data traceability** mechanisms to ensure auditability of operations, though explicit cybersecurity protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication) are not detailed. Document [45] references **friction modeling** for robot dynamics, which may indirectly support safety by refining motion control precision, but no explicit safety-critical standards (e.g., ISO 10218, IEC 61508) are cited. Document [42] mentions a **safety cell** restricting physical range, while data is streamed via **MQTT** (Document [52]), a lightweight protocol lacking inherent security guarantees unless augmented externally. No access control, threat mitigation, or fail-safe mechanisms are specified."
]
